items.name: Vanilla
items.description: A dependable 1000 ml family tub for easy sharing, repeat visits, and quick take-home orders.

items.name: Butter Scotch
items.description: A richer family-pack option for customers who want a more indulgent scoop without overcomplicating the order.

items.name: Kaju Kiss Mish
items.description: One of the more distinctive family-pack choices, positioned for customers who want something beyond the usual basics.

items.name: Mango Double
items.description: A request-based flavour for customers who want something brighter or seasonal without expecting guaranteed stock every day.

items.name: Couple Sundaes
items.description: An easy dine-in choice for pairs or friends, designed for customers who want an in-store treat instead of only take-home tubs.

items.name: Seasonal Specials
items.description: Rotating daily or periodic specials that help the site feel fresh without locking the business into a rigid menu promise.

items.name: Fresh Dairy Range
items.description: Highlights the broader Sree Rajarajeshwari Dairy Foods offering so the brand feels like more than a single-product parlour.

items.name: Party and Office Orders
items.description: For birthdays, team treats, and gathering orders where the right combination matters more than a standard checkout page.
